name: KIBO 10 Kit
description: The KIBO 10 Kit is the perfect starting point for young children to learn the basics of coding and robotics through hands-on play.

name: KIBO 15 Kit
description: The KIBO 15 Kit expands on the starter set with more programming blocks and capabilities, allowing for more complex creations.

name: KIBO 18 Kit
description: The KIBO 18 Kit includes a wide variety of sensors and modules, offering a rich and comprehensive STEAM learning experience.

name: KIBO 21 Kit
description: The ultimate KIBO experience! The KIBO 21 Kit contains every programming block, sensor, and module available, unlocking limitless possibilities for invention.

name: KIBO Home Robotics Guide
description: A comprehensive guide designed specifically for homes and homeschools to introduce coding, robotics and engineering to children. This booklet explains the scope and sequence of the course curriculum along with tips specifically for homes and homeschools. Perfect for parents and caregivers who want to bring KIBO robotics into their home-based learning environment.
